===Be the Best! Pokémon B+W===
[[File:Cheren PBW.png|thumb|150px|Cheren in Be the Best! Pokémon B+W]]
Cheren is friends with both [[Monta]] and Bianca. He is very knowledgeable about Pokémon, which Monta dislikes. Anywhere Monta slips up he won't hesitate to tell him the right way.

He first appears with Bianca when Monta is attempting to capture a {{pkmn2|wild}} {{p|Patrat}} and {{p|Watchog}}. Monta is just about to capture the Watchog which Cheren tells him that it is not the right way. He explains to Monta to remember that when two Pokémon come out at the same time, one should knock out the one they don't want before they can get the one that they do want. Cheren suddenly decides for all of them to take their Pokémon journey together, which a man on his bike overhears. He starts insulting them making him and Monta angry.

He uses Tepig in a Double Battle with Monta's {{p|Snivy}} against a Biker King's {{p|Braviary}}, it looks like they were about to lose, but they uses a combination attack which Cheren thinks of, fainting Braviary. Cheren battles Monta in ''[[PBW2|The Key to Triple Battles]]'' using his Tepig, {{p|Pansage}} and {{p|Basculin}} against Monta's {{p|Snivy}}, {{p|Panpour}}, and {{p|Roggenrola}}. He starts off with a lecture about [[Triple Battle]]s. With his great knowledge of triple battles he gives Monta a hard time, but is eventually defeated. He has traveled with Monta and Bianca from time to time.

Cheren battles Monta in ''[[PBW8|The Birth of the Best Pokémon Trainer!]]'' in a Single and Triple Battle. Even though the Single Battle was easier for Monta, Cheren gave him a hard time in the Triple Battle.

|desc=Cheren's {{p|Tepig}} is well trained and has a type advantage over [[Monta's Snivy]]. It was first used in a [[Double Battle]] with Snivy against the Biker King's {{p|Braviary}}. After Snivy tries a {{m|Vine Whip}} which hardly does any damage, he goes in for a fire attack which hardly does any damage too. Tepig is then sent flying with {{m|Peck}}. It goes in with a Fire Pledge with {{m|Grass Pledge}} creating the combination needed to defeat Braviary.

It battles Monta in ''[[PBW2|The Key to Triple Battles]]'' with {{p|Pansage}} and {{p|Basculin}} against Monta's {{p|Snivy}}, {{p|Panpour}} and {{p|Roggenrola}}. It starts off with an Ember on Snivy, before taking a hit for Basculin by switching places with it, not hurting it much. But seconds later, Panpour uses {{m|Surf}} fainting it.

Tepig reappeared as an {{p|Emboar}} where it fought with Monta's {{p|Reshiram}}, {{p|Victini}} and {{p|Zekrom}} in the Single and Triple Battle.

Emboar's known moves are {{m|Fire Pledge}}, {{m|Ember}}, {{m|Flare Blitz}}, {{m|Rock Slide}}, and {{m|Blast Burn}}.}}
